name: Temperatures Rising
overview: Temperatures Rising is an American television sitcom that ran from September 12, 1972 to August 29, 1974 on the ABC network. The network had a good deal of faith in the low-rated series, which went through three cast changes, two different formats, and two time slots during its run.

trailers.title: Temperatures Rising 1x05 The Muscle and the Medic
